title: Savory Stir Fry with Sweet Potato
description: A delicious and easy-to-make stir fry dish featuring sweet potatoes as the main ingredient. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a quick lunch.

ingredients.name: Tender
ingredients.notes: Assuming tender is referring to a type of stir-fry sauce or seasoning

ingredients.name: And
ingredients.notes: Assuming and is not an ingredient and is part of the stir-fry name

ingredients.name: Canadian
ingredients.notes: Assuming Canadian is not an ingredient and is part of the cuisine

ingredients.name: Stir Fry
ingredients.notes: Not a specific ingredient, assuming a general stir-fry sauce or seasoning

instructions: Peel and chop the sweet potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped sweet potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add your preferred stir-fry sauce or seasoning to the skillet and stir to coat the sweet potatoes.
Continue cooking for another 5 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
